message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Activate test: "should keep still life block unchanged"
Current state: 3 tests passing
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts

Context: nextGeneration takes [number,number][] (living cell coordinates) and returns [number,number][].
Block still life: cells [(0,0),(1,0),(0,1),(1,1)] each have exactly 2-3 neighbors → all survive.
Result should be [(0,0),(1,0),(0,1),(1,1)] (same cells).
Current implementation returns [] for all inputs, so this test should FAIL (red).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
